text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's well past sunset, so I decide to escort Rice
Shower home after a day out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... Can you do something for me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... Can you do something for me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if you could wait in your office
for a little bit...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have something I want to show you.
choice_data_list: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have something I want to show you.
choice_data_list: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! I'll be there really soon, so just
hold on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I wait for her, I make us both a cup of tea
and wonder what she could possibly want to show
me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: This is what I wanted to show you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She holds out a book to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The black cover reads The Sun and the Child of Shadow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is... a picture book that I made. I'd like you
to read it.
choice_data_list: Is it okay if I read it now?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is... a picture book that I made. I'd like you
to read it.
choice_data_list: Is it okay if I read it now?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles as I open it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't have any text. It starts with pure
darkness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something crouching in that darkness. A
silhouette... that kind of looks like Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shadowy figure is crying in the darkness. She
looks so sad and lonely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a small light appears in the darkness,
and the little shadow begins to walk toward the
light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she continues walking, the light grows stronger
and stronger. It grows radiant, until finally...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The light turns into the sun. The darkness is
dispelled, and the world is illuminated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun's warm light washes over the shadowy
figure, revealing her true form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the final page, the girl, once consumed by
shadows, is now prancing around joyfully in the
world of light.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I wanted to show this book to you before
anyone else.
choice_data_list: I'm honored.
I'm honored.
I'm sure it will make people very happy.
I want to be like that sun.
I want to be like that sun.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I wanted to show this book to you before
anyone else.
choice_data_list: I'm honored.
I'm honored.
I'm sure it will make people very happy.
I want to be like that sun.
I want to be like that sun.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You've always been the closest to me, watching
over me with warmth and kindness.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's why... I wanted to show you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's why... I wanted to show you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: My precious, precious... happiness.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please watch over me... forever and ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod with so much enthusiasm that she ends up
laughing at me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, I hope so.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That book is the embodiment of my happiness,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And it sounds like my feelings got across to you.
choice_data_list:
Now you can spread your happiness to even
more people.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And it sounds like my feelings got across to you.
choice_data_list:
Now you can spread your happiness to even
more people.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Brother, I... I want everyone who supports me
to be happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Sister, I... I want everyone who supports me to
be happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Since I made that book, this feeling—this
wish—has become even stronger within me.
choice_data_list:
Then you can count on me to help make it
happen.

Then you can count on me to help make it
happen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah. With your help, I'm sure...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah. With your help, I'm sure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Rice Shower trails off with a smile on her face,
I make a silent vow to myself that I will see her
wish come true, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... You've always been...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... You've always been...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: My sun.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Because of your support and faith in me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Because of your support and faith in me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've been able to change, little by little...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I took the happiness you've given me and
made it into this book.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for everything.
choice_data_list: Now it's your turn to become the sun.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for everything.
choice_data_list: Now it's your turn to become the sun.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... can be the sun?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... want to try.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to shine... and bring happiness to
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to be their sun!
choice_data_list: Let's make that dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, Rice Shower's eyes shine like the
sun, as if a bright dream has settled within them.
